scripts.build:connector: npm run build --workspace @chatpro/whatsapp-core && npm run build --workspace @chatpro/whatsapp-connector
scripts.build: npm run build:web && npm run build:connector
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace @chatpro/web && npm run typecheck --workspace @chatpro/whatsapp-core && npm run typecheck --workspace @chatpro/whatsapp-connector
scripts.check: npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run build
